    6. labapi.util.part_type.is_part_type
    • Copy page
    • View source

    labapi.util.part_type.is_part_type#

    labapi.util.part_type.is_part_type(
    part_type: str,
    ) → TypeGuard[PartType][source]#

    Checks if a part type is recognized by LabArchives.

    This function validates whether a given part type is one of the known LabArchives entry types, regardless of whether it’s implemented in labapi.

    Acts as a TypeGuard, narrowing the type to PartType when it returns True.

    Note

    This function expects a normalized part type (lowercase, stripped). Use get_normalized_part_type() first if the input may have mixed case.

    Parameters:

    part_type – The normalized part type string to check.

    Returns:

    True if the part type is recognized, False otherwise.

    Example:
    >>> is_part_type("attachment")
True
>>> is_part_type("sketch entry")
True
>>> is_part_type("unknown type")
False
>>> is_part_type("Attachment")  # Not normalized!
False
    Previouslabapi.util.part_type.get_normalized_part_type Next labapi.util.part_type.is_valid_part_type
